sourcesContent:
Planets

Project about planets using basic web technologies.
Tic-tac-toe Play

Designed and developed an interactive Tic-Tac-Toe game using React, featuring dynamic UI updates and state management.
The Bank App

Developed a bank application using Java, implementing user authentication, account management, and transaction tracking.
